rationale: The 8b664359..196f07d2 code delta is genuinely comment-only across the three internal/approve Go files: no executable statement, test body, or assertion changed, including TestApproveImpl_NoCommitsNoBeads. The comments accurately describe actual control flow: readPlanBeadIDs returns an error for empty bead_ids; Leg 3 refuses on planErr before CommitCount; therefore any path reaching the preflight has planErr == nil and len(beadIDs) > 0, making its degenerate-plan disjunction unreachable. MergeBase is at impl.go:294 and the former :249 citation is correctly contextualized. All 11 named gate tests plus TestApproveImplCallOrder passed. go build ./... and fresh tests for internal/approve, internal/complete, internal/lifecycle, and internal/executor passed. Since behavior is byte-unchanged outside comments, the round-1 four-leg fail-directions remain intact and no fail-open was introduced.

findings.section_1: ADDRESSED — delta is comment-only; no executable code or assertions changed.
findings.section_2: ADDRESSED — requested build, package suites, 11 named tests, and call-order test pass; gate behavior is untouched.
findings.section_3: ADDRESSED — preflight-subsumption reasoning and MergeBase line citation are true in the actual code.
findings.section_4: ADDRESSED — no behavioral delta and no new fail-open introduced.
